jobs.title: Senior Product Manager
jobs.content: <p><strong>Senior Product Manager</strong></p><p>Dremio is the data-lakehouse + open-table-format query-engine platform pioneered around SQL-on-Iceberg & Apache-Arrow-acceleration.</p>

jobs.title: Future Opportunities

departments.name: Unsure what to apply for? No worries! Submit your resume here.

jobs.content: <p>Dremio's general-interest pool — no specific role attached. Submit your resume to be considered for future opportunities across the data-lakehouse / Sonar / Arctic platform.</p>
